DATA_P: Hi, I'm Amine! I'm a full-stack software engineer specializing in building scalable web applications from the ground up. On the backend, I design high-performance REST APIs and robust server architectures using Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL. On the frontend, I develop modern, responsive user interfaces that deliver seamless user experiences. I focus on clean code, performance, and end-to-end integration to bring complete, production-ready solutions to life.
ABOUT_DESC: Full-stack software engineer specializing in high-performance backend development and the creation of modern administration interfaces. Expert in the Node.js ecosystem (Express, TypeScript, Sequelize, PostgreSQL) and Angular for building interactive and secure administrative dashboards. Experienced in integrating third-party services: Stripe (payments), OneSignal (push notifications), and Minio (S3-compatible object storage). Rigorous and collaborative, I pride myself on delivering maintainable, well-documented, and high-performing solutions.
DESCRIPTION_HBM: Full-stack accounting automation app for HBM Consulting — built with Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL and Angular, streamlining invoice and reporting workflows.
DESCRIPTION_SWEET: Full-stack ordering platform for a pastry shop — product catalog, cart, and order management built with Node.js, Angular, and PostgreSQL.
PORTFOLIO_COIF: Responsive full-stack web app for hairdressers — online product ordering and appointment booking with Node.js, Angular, and PostgreSQL.
PORTFOLIO_COMMERCE: Multi-vendor e-commerce platform (web + mobile) with Stripe payments, vendor dashboards, and product management — Node.js, Angular, React Native, PostgreSQL.
PORTFOLIO_ACTIVITY: Employee activity management system with role-based access control and reporting — Node.js, Express, TypeScript, Angular, PostgreSQL.
PORTFOLIO_FORCELEARN: Educational web application 'ForceLearn' — course management, student progress tracking, and interactive content delivery — Node.js, Angular, PostgreSQL.
